chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3225 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Patoli advocate for petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner at the very outset states that Board of Revenue, Government of Sindh has issued a notification dated 21.10.2024 for redressal of the grievances by establishing a “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” under the Supervision of concerned Deputy Commissioner across the Sindh province hence, the petitioner intends to exhaust such remedy for redressal of his grievance in view of the said notification;. However, he seeks disposal of instant petition with direction to the Deputy Commissioner Dadu for decision on the grievance application of the petitioner within a reasonable time. In view of the above instant petition stands disposed of with direction to the Deputy Commissioner, Dadu to dispose of the grievance application to be filed by the petitioner, if filed, within a period of thirty days. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
